description: All 32 data sources used in the Greenbay market dashboard. Verified 2026-02-26. 30/31 unique URLs return 200. McKinsey URL correct but bot-protected (returns 503 to automated requests, works in browser).

items.name: IEA Global EV Outlook 2024
items.note: Primary source for EV bus & truck global stock and sales data

items.name: IEA Global EV Outlook 2025 — Heavy-Duty EV Trends
items.note: EV truck annual sales 93K (2024), China 75K+. EV bus stock 766K. Regional breakdowns. Contains H2 data Chapter 4.

items.name: WRI — Countries Electrifying Bus Fleets Fastest
items.note: LATAM & Global EV bus adoption rates

items.name: E-Bus Radar — European Electric Bus Market
items.note: EU electric bus fleet stock ~22K (2024). +41% H1 2025 registrations.

items.name: Precedence Research — Heavy-Duty Trucks Market
items.note: Diesel truck market share estimates; global HD fleet baseline

items.name: State of Sustainable Fleets 2024
items.note: NA EV truck registrations 3.8K (2024). CNG truck data. Authoritative annual North American report.

items.name: IDTechEx — Electric Heavy-Duty Trucks
items.note: HD EV truck sales breakdown, China 34K+ units in 2023 (paywalled — figures corroborated against IEA GEO 2025)

items.name: FMCSA — A&I Crash Statistics (Fleet Size Data)
items.note: US commercial truck fleet baseline. ~12M registered commercial trucks (Class 3–8) in the US.

items.name: BTS — Freight Facts and Figures
items.note: US freight truck fleet composition, ton-miles by mode.

items.name: Aurora Innovation — Commercial Driverless Trucking Launch
items.note: Aurora commercial launch May 1 2025. Route: Dallas-Houston (I-45). Customers: Uber Freight, Hirschbach.

items.name: Waymo — Ride Volume & Fleet Data
items.note: ~700 robotaxis in commercial service (2024). 250K+ rides/week May 2025. SF, Phoenix, LA.

items.name: Einride — About & Autonomous Fleet Operations
items.note: 200+ AV-capable trucks in EU routes. Backbone of EU L4 AHV estimate.

items.name: McKinsey — Will Autonomy Usher in the Future of Truck Freight?
items.note: Primary source for 2035 AHV projections. US 13% HD truck fleet = 455K; EU 4% = 180K. Market value $616B by 2035. Published Sep 2024. URL correct — bot-protected, works in browser.

items.name: ACEA — Vehicles on European Roads 2026
items.note: FY2024 EU total fleet. Buses: 699,238 (avg age 12.2yr). Trucks: 6.2M (avg age 14.0yr). Vans: 31.1M (avg age 12.9yr). BEV shares: buses 3.5%, trucks 0.3%, vans 1.3%.

items.name: ACEA — EU Bus & Truck Registrations
items.note: EU bus fuel mix: 19% EV share 2024. EV truck tripling to ~10K.

items.name: APTA — Public Transportation Ridership & Fleet Data
items.note: US transit bus fleet: ~14K EV stock (2024). Clean School Bus Program uptake data.

items.name: EU Clean Vehicles Directive 2019/1161 (CVD)
items.note: Mandates minimum ZEV/CEV procurement quotas for public buses and trucks from 2021 and 2026.

items.name: IRA Section 45W — Commercial Clean Vehicle Credit
items.note: Up to $40,000 tax credit per qualifying commercial EV. Under active revision (2025).

items.name: EU Green Deal — Fit for 55 Package
items.note: 55% CO2 reduction by 2030. Drives fleet electrification mandates.

items.name: Samsara FY2025 Annual Report (10-K)
items.note: FY2025 ARR $1.46B. Basis for ARPU benchmarking and 5% penetration precedent.

items.name: Samsara S-1 IPO Prospectus
items.note: IPO prospectus — founding customer base and early fleet data. Basis for 4yr post-Series A penetration timeline.

items.name: Predicts 2026: Transportation (G00841141)
items.note: Primary source for all 4 SPAs. Paywalled — search link provided.

items.name: Predicts 2026: Automotive & Smart Mobility
items.note: Supporting reference. Paywalled.

items.name: Predicts 2026: The New Era of Agentic Automation
items.note: Supporting reference for agentic AI SPA. Paywalled.
